transcript: Speaker A: Hello, what is your name? Speaker B: My name is Rahul. Speaker A: How old are you? Speaker B: I have 22. Speaker A: I have 22 nahi, I am 22 years old hota hai. [Not 'I have 22', it is 'I am 22 years old'.] Speaker B: Okay okay, I am 22 years old. Speaker A: Where are you from? Speaker B: I am Uttar Pradesh. Speaker A: I am Uttar Pradesh nahi, I am from Uttar Pradesh hoga. [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.] Speaker B: Oh... theek hai, theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh... okay, okay. I don't know English very well.] Speaker A: Koi problem nahi. AI teachers try kiya? [No problem. Did you try AI teachers?] Speaker B: Wo to mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaogi. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Speaker B: Wow, kaise join karun? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker A: Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. In just 15 days, you will start seeing improvement. Come on, get started.] Speaker C: Install Now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]

Install Master Spoken Eng; Sirf 15 dino mein; tumhe improvement; dikhne lagegi; Shuru ho jao; MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An interactive museum painting of an AI robot comes to life to converse with a couple, correcting the man's broken English grammar in real-time. The robot explains that the MySivi app offers AI English teachers that are 7 times cheaper than traditional classes and only require 15-20 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app to see improvements within 15 days.
